description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular body with a natural wood grain finish on the top, sides, and legs, giving it a warm and contemporary appearance. The front face is dominated by a single, large drawer with a smooth, matte white panel and a small recessed cutout at the top center serving as a handle. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and splayed outward, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The wood grain pattern is consistent and visible across all non-drawer surfaces, suggesting a veneer or solid wood construction. The drawer appears spacious and functional, suitable for storing personal items or small belongings. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware beyond the minimalist handle cutout, emphasizing a clean and functional design.
description: A modern nightstand with a wood grain finish, splayed tapered legs, and a single white drawer with a recessed handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white drawer with a recessed handle and the splayed wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood grain texture and the depth of the nightstand, with no visible drawer or handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood grain back panel and the legs, with no drawer or handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and the side profile of the legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
